creator: tamone@eig.unige.ch
text:
Swissfrench keyboard mapping is missing in the distribution.

I modified the swissgerman keyboard mapping from Adrian Steinmann, given
in the distribution for the few different important keys to translate it
to swissfrench keyboard mapping.

I include in the "Fix to the problem if known" section, the file
swissfrench.test.kbd to include in /usr/share/syscons/keymaps directory
Not thoroughly tested against standard. Use at your onw risk !

Fix: 

# swissfrench keyboard mapping V 0.1, for FreeBSD 2.2.6-RELEASE by
# Francois TAMONE, tamone@eig.unige.ch,
#
# Quick fix partially checked, for test only, 9 june 1998.
# No warranty to standard conformance at all.
# Derived from swissgerman mapping from Adrian Steinmann.
# Send corrections to tamone@eig.unige.ch also, thanks.
#
#                                                         alt
# scan                       cntrl          alt    alt   cntrl lock
# code  base   shift  cntrl  shift  alt    shift  cntrl  shift state
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
